headline: West Pharmaceutical (WST) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's What You Should Know
summary: West Pharmaceutical (WST) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.
